description: Finite mandatory qualification matrix for reverb conformance. Each entry is a (tail_ms, soften_hz, sample_rate) triple that an engine MUST verify against the normative FDN generator. Non-normative as format definition (derivable from the spec); normatively referenced by docs/15-engine-build-guide.md step 6.

property_test.note: Results are informative and do not affect conformance. The seed and count SHOULD be documented in the engine's release notes.

entries.rationale: minimum tail, minimum soften, minimum rate
Nyquist clamp (12000 clamped to 3920 at 8 kHz)
medium tail, minimum soften, canonical rate
medium tail, maximum soften, canonical rate
long FFT sizing (T=96001 > 65536, tests N_fft scaling)
